note: All in-code MISSION_TEMPLATES under src/voxera/core/missions.py plus file-based missions under the repo-level missions/ directory. User-level file missions under ~/.config/voxera/missions are not scanned here because they live outside the repo.

builtin_missions.title: Start Work Mode
builtin_missions.notes: Open core work apps and set baseline volume.

builtin_missions.title: Focus Mode
builtin_missions.goal: Reduce distractions and keep only essentials active
builtin_missions.notes: Lower volume, keep browser active, and verify open windows.

builtin_missions.title: Daily Check-in
builtin_missions.goal: Open status surfaces and prefill notes for a daily update
builtin_missions.notes: Creates a daily check-in note and opens calendar.

builtin_missions.title: Incident Mode
builtin_missions.notes: Open dashboard and terminal, increase alert audibility.

builtin_missions.title: Wrap Up
builtin_missions.goal: Capture end-of-day notes and lower noise
builtin_missions.notes: Review notes, copy summary text, and lower volume.

builtin_missions.title: Notes Archive Flow
builtin_missions.goal: Archive an inbox note into organized notes archive with bounded file skills
builtin_missions.notes: Uses bounded notes-scope file skills end-to-end: preflight existence and metadata, ensure destination directory, copy into archive, then delete original (delete requires approval policy).

builtin_missions.title: System Check
builtin_missions.goal: Collect baseline status and verify command path

builtin_missions.title: System Inspection
builtin_missions.goal: Collect a bounded read-only snapshot of local workstation state for audit evidence
builtin_missions.notes: Read-only local health inspection workflow. Composes system status, disk usage, process listing, and open windows into a single bounded diagnostic snapshot. All skills are state.read / window.read only — no mutations, no network, no approval required. Executes through the queue for canonical audit trail and evidence production.

builtin_missions.title: System Diagnostics
builtin_missions.goal: Collect bounded read-only host diagnostics for queue-backed triage evidence
builtin_missions.notes: First bounded diagnostics pack for operator triage. Read-only only: host info, memory, CPU/load, disk usage, and process snapshot. Designed for deterministic queue execution with canonical artifacts/evidence (execution_result + step_results). Service-specific inspection is supported through system.service_status and system.recent_service_logs skills using explicit args and bounded limits.

file_missions.title: Sandbox Network Test
file_missions.goal: Run sandbox command with network enabled to exercise approval flow.
file_missions.notes: This mission requests network=true and should require approval under default policy.

file_missions.title: Sandbox Smoke
file_missions.goal: Run a basic sandbox execution smoke test with network disabled.
file_missions.notes: Validates command execution and writable /work artifacts.
